includes one record for each practice that was subject to the VM based on the given performance year. Using the RIF data, researchers can examine trends in cost and quality performance and identify factors supporting higher quality at lower cost.
The VM Practice-Level RIF contains Quality and Resource Use Report (QRUR) and VM information. Program and participation information can be found on the CMS website.
